sql.if: AND (c1.contract_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{businessNo},'%') OR c2.contract_no LIKE CONCAT('%',#{businessNo},'%'))

AND DATE_FORMAT((SELECT v.created_date As lastBillDate FROM t_apply_invoice_received v WHERE v.contract_id = r.buy_contract_id AND v.status = 'D' order by v.created_date desc limit 1), '%Y-%m-%d') >= DATE_FORMAT(#{beginTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')

AND DATE_FORMAT((SELECT v.created_date As lastBillDate FROM t_apply_invoice_received v WHERE v.contract_id = r.buy_contract_id AND v.status = 'D' order by v.created_date desc limit 1), '%Y-%m-%d') <= DATE_FORMAT(#{endTime}, '%Y-%m-%d')

mapper.select:
SELECT c1.business_type As businessType, r.product_name AS productName, r.brand_number AS brandNumber, r.factory_id AS factoryId, r.factory_name AS factoryName, r.buy_company_id AS buyCompanyId, r.buy_company_name AS buyCompanyName, bp.deal_price AS buyPrice, bp.deal_number As buyTotalNumber, bp.total_price AS buyTotalAmount, (c1.total_amount - IFNULL(c1.billed_amount, 0)) AS invoiceBillAmount, r.sell_company_id AS sellCompanyId, r.sell_company_name AS sellCompanyName, sp.deal_price AS sellPrice, sp.deal_number AS sellTotalNumber, sp.total_price AS sellTotalAmount, (c2.total_amount - IFNULL(c2.billed_amount, 0)) AS receiveBillAmount, c1.id As buyId, c2.id As sellId, c1.contract_no As buyContractNo, c1.source As source, c1.our_company_name As ourCompanyName, c1.contract_time As buyContractDate, c1.bill_flg As billFlg, c1.match_user_name As buyMatchUserName, c2.contract_no As sellContractNo, c2.match_user_name As sellMatchUserName, sp.warehouse_number As warehouseNumber, c2.contract_time As sellContractDate, (SELECT v.created_date As lastBillDate FROM t_apply_invoice_received v WHERE v.contract_id = r.buy_contract_id AND v.status = 'D' order by v.created_date desc limit 1) As lastBillDate, c1.delivery_mode As buyDeliveryMode, c1.transport_amount As buyTransportAmount, c1.warehouse_amount As buyWarehouseAmount, c2.delivery_mode As sellDeliveryMode, c2.transport_amount As sellTransportAmount, c2.warehouse_amount As sellWarehouseAmount, c1.match_user_id As matchUserId, (SELECT f.calculate_no FROM t_apply_calculate f WHERE f.contract_id = c2.id AND f.status = 'N' limit 1) As calculateNo FROM t_ctr_contract_rela r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c1 ON c1.id = r.buy_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c2 ON c2.id = r.sell_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product bp ON bp.id = r.buy_product_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product sp ON sp.id = r.sell_product_id WHERE 1=1 AND c1.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
ORDER BY r.id DESC
ORDER BY r.id ASC
ORDER BY r.id DESC

SELECT SUM(bp.deal_number) As buyTotalNumber, SUM(sp.deal_number) AS sellTotalNumber, SUM(sp.warehouse_number) As warehouseNumber FROM t_ctr_contract_rela r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c1 ON c1.id = r.buy_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c2 ON c2.id = r.sell_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product bp ON bp.id = r.buy_product_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product sp ON sp.id = r.sell_product_id WHERE 1=1 AND c1.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
ORDER BY r.id DESC
ORDER BY r.id ASC
ORDER BY r.id DESC
SELECT t.in_invoice_no AS receiveBillNo FROM t_apply_invoice_received t WHERE t.contract_id = #{buyId} AND t.in_invoice_no != ''
SELECT t.invoice_no AS invoiceBillNo FROM t_apply_invoice t WHERE t.contract_id = #{sellId} AND t.invoice_no != ''
SELECT v.created_date As lastBillDate FROM t_apply_invoice_received v WHERE v.contract_id = #{buyId} AND v.status = 'D' order by v.created_date desc limit 1

SELECT c1.business_type As businessType, r.product_name AS productName, r.brand_number AS brandNumber, r.factory_id AS factoryId, r.factory_name AS factoryName, r.buy_company_id AS buyCompanyId, r.buy_company_name AS buyCompanyName, bp.deal_number As buyTotalNumber, bp.total_price AS buyTotalAmount, r.sell_company_name AS sellCompanyName, sp.deal_number AS sellTotalNumber, sp.total_price AS sellTotalAmount, c1.id As buyId, c2.id As sellId, c1.contract_no As buyContractNo, c1.our_company_name As ourCompanyName, c1.contract_time As buyContractDate, c1.match_user_name As buyMatchUserName, c2.contract_no As sellContractNo, c2.match_user_name As sellMatchUserName, c2.contract_time As sellContractDate, c1.delivery_mode As buyDeliveryMode, c2.delivery_mode As sellDeliveryMode, c1.match_user_id As matchUserId, (SELECT f.calculate_no FROM t_apply_calculate f WHERE f.contract_id = c2.id AND f.status = 'N' limit 1) As calculateNo FROM t_ctr_contract_rela r LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c1 ON c1.id = r.buy_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_apply_calculate f ON f.contract_id = r.sell_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_contract c2 ON c2.id = r.sell_contract_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product bp ON bp.id = r.buy_product_id LEFT JOIN t_ctr_product sp ON sp.id = r.sell_product_id WHERE c1.enterprise_id = #{enterpriseId}
AND (
c1.business_type = 'ZY-BB'
(c1.match_user_id = #{matchUserId} AND c1.business_type = 'ZY-BB')
OR c1.business_type = 'DL-KZ'
OR c1.business_type = 'DL-KZ'
OR c1.business_type = 'DL-DC'
OR c1.business_type = 'DL-DC'
) GROUP BY c1.id,c2.id ORDER BY ( SELECT f.calculate_no FROM t_apply_calculate f WHERE f.contract_id = c2.id AND f. STATUS = 'N' LIMIT 1 ) DESC, r.id DESC
